titleStmt.title: SII 17.640: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 640. (A.R. No. 590 of 1904.) ŚRĪNIVĀSANALLŪR, MUSIRI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Kuraṅganātha temple.
This inscription is dated in the reign of Madiraikoṇḍa Parakēsarivarman i.e., Parāntaka I.

It records a gift of land to Tirukkurakkuttuṟai Perumāṉaḍigaḷ of Mahēndramaṅgalam, a brahmadēya, for a lamp by Kāḷi Nīli the brāhmaṇi of Pāṉachchaṉ Nārāyaṇaṉ Kṛishṇaṉ of that place. Pāṉachchaṉ Nārāyanaṉ-Chēndan was her guardian. The land is stated to have been acquired from her husband for her maintenance (śōṟu-kūṟai).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .. matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 Āvatu piramateyam mahentra maṅkalattu tirukkurakkuttuṟai perumāṉaṭikaḷuk
ku Ivvūr pāṉaccaṉ nārāyaṇaṅkiruṣṇaṉ pirāmaṇi kāḷi nili Eṉ bhattāraṉ nārāyaṇaṅ kiruṣṇaṉiṭai coṟu kūṟai peṟṟuṭaiya toṭṭam O
rumāvum tiruviḷakkāka dharmmatāṉamāka pāṉaccaṉ nārāyaṇañ centaṉ mutukaṇāka niroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭutteṉ niliyeṉ niroṭu Aṭṭiṉa to
ṭṭattukku Icaitta Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai Iṭṭerikku mekkun teṉpāṟkellai pāṉaccaṉ pālai nāraṇaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai
tāyaṉ Araṅkaṉ kuṇiyaṉ pirāmaṇi ka Umaiyāḷ stridhaṉam peṟṟa toṭṭat tukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tiruvaikuntattu perumāṉaṭika
ḷiṉ tevatāṉamāṉa toṭṭattukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilam Oru māvun tirukkurakkuttuṟai perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Aṭṭik kuṭutteIncomplete. Another section engraved in characters of about the 10th century A.D. reads as follows: 1 kaṇattā peruñceyyil iraṇṭu māvuñ ce••••• 2 mpuṇivārattu araiyum paḻantevatāṉam•••••
Digital edition of SII 17.640 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
